degraded.reason: Repo-hygiene/privacy iterate changed zero source, test, or build-affecting files (only .gitignore, .shipwright data/docs, and unreferenced PoC screenshots). No related test exists and worktree node_modules were not hydrated; a full-suite run carries no information value. Verification was done with deterministic git/grep probes recorded under test_completeness.

surface_verification.justification: Repo-hygiene/privacy iterate; no startable runtime surface changed.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Four acceptance behaviors of this hygiene iterate: (1) residual PII removed from all tracked files, (2) *.md.lock ignored everywhere including under the agent_docs whitelist, (3) decision_log.md.lock untracked yet preserved on disk, (4) the 7 unreferenced PoC screenshots removed and future-ignored.
test_completeness.justification: No-source repo-hygiene change; each behavior is verified by a deterministic git/grep probe rather than a unit test (none applies). 4 acceptance behaviors, 4 covered.

behaviors.behavior: residual PII (dev username, company name, internal IP, hardcoded home paths) is gone from every tracked file
behaviors.evidence: Case-sensitive recursive grep in the worktree for the dev username, the company name, the internal IP, and the Windows home-path form all return zero matches; the only remaining svenroth-ai hits are the intentional public GitHub org handle. triage.jsonl still parses as 137/137 valid JSON records.

behaviors.behavior: *.md.lock sidecar lockfiles are git-ignored, including under the .shipwright/agent_docs/ whitelist negation
behaviors.evidence: git check-ignore .shipwright/agent_docs/decision_log.md.lock returns the path (ignored); the rule is placed after the agent_docs whitelist so it wins precedence.

behaviors.behavior: decision_log.md.lock is untracked but preserved on disk
behaviors.evidence: git ls-files reports no *.lock entries; the file still exists on disk.

behaviors.behavior: the 7 unreferenced PoC screenshots are removed from tracking and future-ignored
behaviors.evidence: git ls-files filtered for poc-screenshot is empty; git check-ignore on a screenshot path returns it; no source or test file references .poc-screenshots.
